case_title: SHOEMAKER, DEMIAN et al VS DEWOLF REALTY CO C/O AARON SINEL,MANAGING DIRECTOR

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $607.80 FILED BY SHOEMAKER, DEMIAN GREBEN, RACHEL AS TO DEFENDANT DEWOLF REALTY CO C/O AARON SINEL,MANAGING DIRECTOR ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR NOV-07-1996 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT C

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF SHOEMAKER, DEMIAN GREBEN, RACHEL IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT DEWOLF REALTY CO C/O AARON SINEL,MANAGING DIRECTOR PROOF OF SERVICE WAIVED. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
